title: throw NullPointerException in Minecraft
description: This is a mod to throw a NullPointerException by using the item in the mod.It is just for fun. :D
body:
This is a mod to throw a NullPointerException by using the item in the mod. It is just for fun. :D

You can only get the item through command
```
/give @s throw_null-pointer-exception_in_minecraft:crash_item
```
![commandline output](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f58b9a16e5a3612c8872425c339f19b97d3bf8.png)
